examples: The programme is angled towards younger viewers.
He angled his chair so that he could sit and watch her.
It is first ground into mince and then steamed and rotated in an oven angled like a cement mixer so that the juices run off.
And in stoppage time, Gerrard lashed in an angled shot to snatch the points.
Would a bottom-line driven Mass General or Glenbrook have angled for a longer hospital stay?
